title: Twitter @fishnets88
summary:
@ceyda_cinarel For phrases -> sense2vec. 
For bad spelling -> bytepair or floret 
For sentences -> sentence-transformers
Just words: spaCy. 

I wrote a library that makes it pretty easy to just use any of them: 

https://t.co/tTK7QASm4U

title: Twitter @halford_max
summary: I made a Python package to measure string edit distances based on keyboard layouts -> https://t.co/sQZd33oP4Z. It should be useful for spelling correction as well as analyzing keystroke dynamics 🤓
